title: Budget
description: A cost-governance budget. The rule_expression is evaluated by the simpleeval-backed eval_condition() defined in plugins/agenticops/skills/cost-governance/SKILL.md.

scope_ref.description: Concrete target. account id, Agent.id, Skill.id, Deployment.id, or 'k=v' tag pair.

limit_usd.description: Hard limit in USD for the period.

rule_expression.description: simpleeval expression evaluated against runtime metrics. Example: 'spend_usd > limit_usd * 0.8'. Must NOT use Python eval() semantics beyond the simpleeval sandbox.

action_on_breach.description: What agenticops does when rule_expression becomes true.
